title: Injunctions prohibited
doc_html:
§337.62.  Injunctions prohibited

No court of this state shall issue any process whatsoever to restrain the collection of any tax, penalty, interest, or other charge imposed.

Acts 2003, No. 73, §1, eff. July 1, 2003.
